overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding game showing a character in house robes exploring a grand gothic castle entrance hall, ascending a sweeping stone staircase, and exiting to a snow-covered exterior balcony with panoramic views of castle towers and snowy mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand castle entrance hall with sweeping staircase

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the castle entrance hall toward the grand staircase, passing benches and windows

notable_agents.action: two students in dark robes standing and conversing by the staircase wall
student walking away in the distance toward the stone archway

entered.detail: sweeping curved staircase with stone balustrades rising to upper level
floor-to-ceiling arched windows with diamond lattice panes letting in natural light
intricate geometric tile pattern in gold and brown tones covering the hall floor
long vertical banners in yellow and blue hanging from the vaulted ceiling
wooden benches lined against the left wall beneath the windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast gothic entrance hall with patterned marble floors and soaring windows. Two students converse near the base of a grand staircase while banners hang from the high ceiling. The camera follows the character as they approach the staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone staircase with portrait-lined walls

events.description: character begins ascending the grand staircase, transitioning from hall walking to stair climbing

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved stone staircase, passing other students ascending and descending

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: framed portraits and house crest tapestries mounted on the stone walls beside the stairs
arched stone doorway at the top of the stairs leading to the upper floor

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the sweeping stone staircase, passing framed portraits and house banners on the walls. Natural light streams through tall windows as other students move up and down the stairs. The camera follows the steady climb toward the upper landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered stone balcony with castle view

events.description: character exits the indoor staircase through a large wooden door into the snowy exterior corridor
lighting shifts from warm indoor stone tones to bright overcast snow light

agents.ego_description: walking through the wooden door onto the snow-covered balcony and approaching the railing to view the castle grounds

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking away down the snow-covered corridor

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with diagonal planks that swings open to reveal the exterior
open-air stone walkway with snow-covered floor and arched colonnade supports
snow-covered gothic towers and rooftops of the castle visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character exits through a heavy wooden door into a snow-covered stone corridor open to the winter air. The scene transitions from the enclosed stone interior to a bright, snowy exterior with views of the castle's towers and snow-laden mountains in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the opulent interior of a gothic entrance hall to a bright, snow-covered exterior balcony. It begins by following a character across patterned marble floors and past conversing students toward the base of a grand staircase. As the character ascends the sweeping stone steps, the scene shifts upward past framed portraits and house banners while natural light streams through soaring windows. The camera then follows the steady climb to the upper landing before passing through a heavy wooden door. The enclosed stone interior finally opens into a winter corridor, revealing a panoramic view of towering castle spires and snow-laden mountains under a bright sky.
